candidateContexts.label: order-other-service order entity and query DTO data surface

candidateCovers.label: notification-service dispatch measurement surface (email, mq, config)
order-other-service order lifecycle measurement surface (http, authority, service, entity)
order-service HTTP endpoint and authority measurement surface

notes: small component, single method publishes a value to a configured AMQP queue
thin Spring Data repository interface over NotifyInfo, no custom finder methods
renders a Freemarker template selected by the caller then sends via JavaMailSender
interface only; four boolean-returning notification methods, implementation carries the behavior
four sibling methods repeat the same build-mail/populate-model/send/catch pattern with distinct templates and model fields
injected JavaMailSender field is declared but never invoked directly in this class; all four methods delegate to MailService
mail password env var has a hardcoded literal fallback default
standard Spring Boot bootstrap; declares a load-balanced RestTemplate bean used for inter-service calls
the wildcard permitAll matcher for the base orderOther path is declared before the verb-specific role matchers in the same authorizeRequests chain
16 endpoints delegating one-to-one to OrderOtherService methods; most non-welcome endpoints carry a per-endpoint @CrossOrigin(origins="*") annotation
price kept as unparsed String field; equals() second conjunct compares boughtDate against the other object's travelDate
plain DTO (not a JPA @Entity) that still carries @GeneratedValue annotations on two String fields
disableStateQuery() sets the enableTravelDateQuery field and the state sentinel, and does not modify the enableStateQuery field
CommandLineRunner seeds exactly one hardcoded paid order on startup via OrderOtherService.create
two custom finder methods beyond the CRUD default; commented-out @Query annotations left in place
interface only; 18 methods, all but initOrder return a Response wrapper
largest file in the chunk (477 lines, 20 public methods); order-status codes accessed only via OrderStatus.<NAME>.getCode(), no inline integer literals observed
rabbitmq/cloud-stream binding block is present but entirely commented out
mirrors OrderOtherApplication bootstrap shape, same load-balanced RestTemplate bean pattern
here the verb-specific role matchers for the base order path are declared before the wildcard permitAll matcher, the reverse declaration order from ts-order-other-service.SecurityConfig
16 endpoints closely mirroring OrderOtherController's route shape under /api/v1/orderservice instead of /api/v1/orderOtherService; OrderService/OrderServiceImpl are not in this chunk's worklist
